expectations.text: Response uses list_requests with statusCode: 401 (correct param name and value, not a URL pattern or method filter)
expectations.evidence: list_requests(statusCode: 401) with JSON arguments { "statusCode": 401 } — correct parameter name and value

expectations.text: Response calls or describes calling get_request_detail with an id from the list results
expectations.evidence: Step 2 calls get_request_detail for each returned request ID (req_001 through req_004) in parallel

expectations.text: Response references correct return field names: body, headers, contentType — not 'timing' or 'status' (wrong names from old skill)
expectations.evidence: Uses correct field names: statusCode, contentType, bodySize in list results. get_request_detail response shows body, headers, timestamp correctly.
